title: GEEZY Whiskey Decanter Set, 5 Pcs - 4 Whiskey Tumblers 230ml & 900ml Decanter Carafe, Elegant Diamond Cut - Classic Gift for Men - Alcohol Glasses, Scotch, Rum & Whisky Accessories Enthusiasts
features: CLASSIC SET FOR YOUR BAR: Our 5-piece lead free whiskey decanter and glasses set includes 1 fluted stopper decanter and 4 matching tumbler glasses, ideal for serving whiskey, scotch, bourbon, rum, or other fine spirits.
DESIGN & CRAFTSMANSHIP: Beautifully crafted in a classic diamond cut, this whiskey decanter and glasses set features stunning starburst detailing for a refined, light-reflecting display.
FUNCTIONAL BENEFITS: The decanter preserves quality by reducing oxidation, enhances aroma, softens strong whiskies, and allows for controlled pouring—must-have whisky accessories for connoisseurs.
IDEAL GIFT CHOICE: A perfect old fashioned gift set for birthdays, housewarmings, or holidays—these whiskey decanter gift sets for men and women offer elegance and versatility for any occasion.
Specifications: Packaging Dimensions: Height 24cm, Depth 10cm, Width 25cm, Weight 1180g / Item Dimensions: Height 24cm, Depth 10cm, Width 25cm / Brand: GEEZY / Material: Glass
